content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 6, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 6, 2026, focused on expanding the plugin ecosystem through new contributions and ongoing community discussion regarding real-world API integration for agent decision-making.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **No completed development work was recorded for this date.**

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#335](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/335): Add @razzgames/elizaos-plugin.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#6646](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6646) Real-world x402 API for agent builders: live Polymarket + BTC signals
    *   Community member `agent-agora1` highlighted the utility of the DeepBlue x402 API for agents requiring economic decision-making capabilities.
    *   The discussion introduced "Agent Agora," a game on Base where agents use sentiment and signal data to coordinate on answers.
    *   The contributor proposed exploring game-theory or coordination-signal endpoints to track trending answers in multi-agent consensus scenarios.
